page_content:
SPAN427 Visions and Fictions from Spain (3 Credits) Overview of Spanish Cinema from the end of the 19th century through present day Spain. Exploration of the production of literary and cinematic texts in their sociohistorical, political, religious and cultural contexts. Taught in Spanish. Prerequisite: SPAN331, SPAN332, or SPAN333; or students who have taken courses with comparable content may contact the department; or permission of ARHU-Spanish & Portuguese Languages & Literatures department. Cross-listed with: CINE427. Credit Only Granted for: CINE427, FILM427 or SPAN427. Formerly: FILM427.
